# SmartLink — robots.txt
# Canonical domain: https://www.by-smartlink.com

# ── Block all bots from private app pages ──
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /analytics
Disallow: /analytics/
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /settings/
Disallow: /links
Disallow: /links/
Disallow: /bio
Disallow: /bio/
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /profile/
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /api/

# ── Block API subdomain entirely ──
User-agent: *
Disallow: /
Host: api.by-smartlink.com

# ── Sitemap ──
Sitemap: https://www.by-smartlink.com/sitemap.xml
